ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., ACS, Census) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source data */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the source data was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units_of_measure" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measure */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measure */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit of measure */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used for the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic category (e.g., Family Structures, Household Types) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category for hierarchical categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login by the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calculated_percentages" (
  "calc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calculated percentage */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data related to the calculation */,
  "calculated_value" REAL /* Calculated percentage value */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used for the calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_margins" (
  "margin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each margin of error */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data related to the margin of error */,
  "margin_value" REAL /* Margin of error value */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level for the margin of error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("margin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "definitions" (
  "definition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each definition entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data related to the definition */,
  "definition_text" TEXT /* Text of the definition */,
  "source_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the source of the definition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("definition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_levels" (
  "unit_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit level */,
  "unit_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit level */,
  "unit_level_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit level */,
  "level_hierarchy" INTEGER /* Hierarchical level of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data related to the label */,
  "label_text" TEXT /* Text of the label */,
  "label_type" TEXT /* Type of the label (e.g., descriptive, technical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)
